commentary:
# Exchange Liquidity Commentary – 3 July

NYSE maintains clear dominance with the lowest ILLIQ (0.0013) and tightest Roll spread (0.9927%), reflecting superior depth and minimal price impact. Nasdaq 100 paradoxically ranks fourth despite lowest ILLIQ (0.0024), constrained by elevated Roll spread (1.6863%), suggesting concentrated order flow. LSE trails significantly with ILLIQ of 0.1165 and highest AR spread (0.8437%), indicating materially wider effective spreads. European venues cluster mid-tier, with Xetra and SIX showing comparable ILLIQ but distinct spread dynamics.
